## [18:08 - 21:10]

But the real power is in your email list. So you use social media as a tool to build your email list. You don't, social is not an asset. Social is simply something you use to build an email list. That works great. That's what I primarily do. I usually either do a video or a PDF, but the most successful is a video plus a PDF about whatever hot topic that they have.
